business_ideas.idea: Reddit: user-driven social news platform, started 2005, sold 2006, public 2024, 75M daily active users.
Delicious: bookmarking service with /popular feature that inspired Reddit's model.
Product Hunt: curated marketplace for product launches, based on Hacker News Show section, sold for $20M.
Pinterest: image bookmarking platform, early investor opportunity at $3M valuation.
StumbleUpon: content discovery via traffic referrals, led to multiple $100M+ investment returns.
Uber: ride-sharing company, founded by Garrett Camp (StumbleUpon connection), $100M+ investor returns.
Trends: Facebook group community for trend research, $3-5M annual recurring revenue via active seeding.

predictions.text: Best ideas are discovered, not created; monitor traffic referrals and side features for early signals.
Reddit's success proved anti-authority founder personality directly translates to product design and culture.
Talent filters like obscure programming languages predict founder quality better than traditional metrics.
